---
pagetitle: "NHS-OA Community"
page-layout: full
search: true
image: img/spc_chart-1.png
image-alt: "Statistical Process Control Chart of breaches showing the colours and logo from the \"Making Data Count\" programme"
repo-actions: [edit, issue]

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 32em
  id: hero-heading

listing: 
  - id: books
    contents: 
    - /books
    - "!books/index.qmd"
    sort: "title"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false
    
  - id: blog
    contents: 
    - /blog
    - "!blog/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-items: 3
    feed: false
---

![](img/oa-logo_basic.png){fig-align="center"}

<br><br>

::: {#hero-heading}
### A community for promoting open code and tools in health and care

Building a community of practice for data analysis and data science using open 
source software in the NHS and wider UK health and care system.

:::

## [Blog](blog/index.qmd)

::: {#blog}
:::

## [Books](books/index.qmd)

::: {#books}
:::

::: footer-text
::: {.footer-container .white-background}
::: footer-block
::: grid

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-2}
<a href='https://www.strategyunitwm.nhs.uk/'><img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/The-Strategy-Unit/assets/main/logo_yellow.svg' alt="The Strategy Unit" align="left" height="80" /></a>
:::

:::
:::
:::
:::
